description: Google Apps Script is a cloud-based scripting platform for automating tasks and extending Google Workspace products. The `script.googleapis.com` service hosts the API used to manage Apps Script projects and execute deployed script functions remotely.
summary: script.googleapis.com exposes one authenticated HTTP API: the Apps Script API at `https://script.googleapis.com/v1`; no GraphQL, MCP, or first-party CLI targeting this domain were found.
